meaning: n.[动]旋毛虫,旋毛形线虫(一种肠寄生虫)
examples: It need not add pancreatin to separate the somatic cells of Trichinella spiralis.
Objective To explore the external cultivation in vitro of larvae of Trichinella spiralis.
The parasiticidal effects of superhigh pressure were studied for Trichinella Spiralis larvae.
